pk_tuples.notes: Single SC dose of 14C-CuHis in healthy adult male subjects (Study CYP-103); geometric mean (CV%) Cmax 67.1 (35.9%) ng/mL; AUC0-24h 185.6 (20.6%); AUC0-inf 296.0 (15.3%); median Tmax 0.75 h (range 0.5-0.76); mean CL 10.3±1.6 L/h; Vd 1034±588 L; t1/2 74.8±49.2 h; serum concentrations measured using radioactivity of eluted fractions from size exclusion-HPLC
